---
title: "TAR 2026"
subtitle: "Taller de Aprendizaje por Refuerzo"
author: "Lucca Frachelle"
date: "2026-01-01"
date-format: "YYYY"
format:
  html:
    toc: false
    number-sections: false
    title-block-banner: false
    anchor-sections: false
    link-external-newwindow: false
    include-after-body: []
    theme:
      light:
        - cosmo
        - assets/stylesheets/theme.scss
        - assets/stylesheets/projects.scss
        - assets/stylesheets/tar-index.scss
      dark:
        - cosmo
        - assets/stylesheets/theme.scss
        - assets/stylesheets/projects.scss
        - assets/stylesheets/tar-index.scss
---

Material del taller: laboratorios en Quarto y entrega final sobre InstructGPT / RLHF.

## Laboratorios

- [Lab 1 — MDP](labs/lab1/Lab1.html)
- [Lab 2 — Q-Learning y TD-Learning](labs/lab2/Lab2.html)
- [Lab 3 — Actor-Critic](labs/lab3/Lab3.html)
- [Lab 4 — PPO](labs/lab4/Lab4.html)

## Entrega final

- [Notas — InstructGPT y RLHF](entrega/rfhf/RLHF-Notas.html)
- [Slides — InstructGPT](entrega/rfhf/RFHF.html)
